alt_text: Classic three-circle Venn diagram with yellow, magenta, and cyan overlapping circles. Red arrows from each individual circle point upward to the label 'الفرادی حیثیت' (Individual Aspect). A yellow arrow from the central intersection points downward to the label 'مجمع کیفیت' (Composite Quality).
notes: Teaching diagram using additive/subtractive color theory as a metaphor for how individual aspects combine into a composite whole.
